plugins.name: foundry-pipeline
plugins.description: Canonical foundry AI-engineering pipeline (v2.1.0). Idea → Research → Prototype → PRD → Board → Execution → QA. Tracker-flexible (local / GitHub / Linear). GitHub Issues integration: board pushes stories as issues with Closes #N wiring; dev-QA loop auto-creates PRs with proper bodies; foundry owns the deploy workflow (firebase / vercel / netlify / custom). Patch-aware. Installable across Claude Code, Zcode, Hermes, OpenCode, Antigravity, MimoCode.
